---
title: "Tracking the Colour of Peatlands"
---

**The Tracking the Colour of Peatland project** uses community science to collect photographs of wetlands and peatlands over the course of the year from publicly accessible sites.

![](./images/Image_14.png){fig-align="center"} 


Any time someone visits a site, they can take a fixed-point photograph of the wetland using one of the specially designed phone cradles and send the photograph over. This allows us to build up a picture of how these wetlands change over the course of the year with regards to their colour.

You can access the photographs using the map below:

<div style="overflow: hidden;
  padding-top: 75%;
  position: relative">
<iframe src="https://peatcolours.shinyapps.io/peatlands_map_app/" title="Processes" scrolling="yes" frameborder="0"
    style="border: 0;
   height: 100%;
   left: 0;
   position: absolute;
   top: 0;
   width: 100%;">
<p>Your browser does not support iframes.</p>
</iframe>
</div>



# Tracking the Colour of Peatlands data summary

<div style="display:flex; gap:20px; justify-content:center;">
  <img src="./images/Image_7.jpg" width="350">
  <img src="./images/Image_8.jpg" width="350">
</div>



<style>

.site-cards details {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border: 1px solid #e3e6ea;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.site-cards summary {
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 1.05em;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.site-cards img {
  margin-top: 10px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  max-width: 320px;
}

</style>

<div class="site-cards">

## Site details


### 🇨🇦 Canada

<details>
<summary><strong>Grande Plée Bleue</strong></summary>

**Location:** Québec, Canada  
**Peatland type:** Raised bog  
**Coordinates:** 46.772, -71.003  

🌐 [Site information](https://www.ville.levis.qc.ca/loisirs/grande-plee-bleue/)  
🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=46.772,-71.003)

<img src="images/sites/grandepleebleue.jpeg">

</details>


<details>
<summary><strong>Miscou</strong></summary>

**Location:** New Brunswick, Canada  
**Peatland type:** Raised bog  
**Coordinates:** 47.948, -64.498  

🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=47.948,-64.498)

<img src="images/sites/miscou.jpeg">

</details>


<details>
<summary><strong>Boreal Wetland Centre</strong></summary>

**Location:** Alberta, Canada  
**Peatland type:** Fen  

🌐 [Site information](https://www.borealwetlandcentre.com/)

<img src="images/sites/borealwetlandcentre.jpeg">

</details>


### 🇦🇺 Australia

<details>
<summary><strong>Cope Hut</strong></summary>

**Location:** Victoria, Australia  
**Peatland type:** Alpine poor fen  
**Coordinates:** -36.906, 147.291  

🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=-36.906,147.291)

<img src="images/sites/copehut.jpeg">

</details>


### 🇬🇧 United Kingdom

#### Scotland

<details>
<summary><strong>Lochend</strong></summary>

**Location:** Shetland, Scotland  
**Peatland type:** Blanket bog  
**Coordinates:** 60.246, -1.213  

🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=60.246,-1.213)

<img src="images/sites/lochend.jpeg">

</details>


<details>
<summary><strong>Forsinard Flows</strong></summary>

**Location:** Scotland  
**Peatland type:** Blanket bog  
**Coordinates:** 58.353, -3.905  

🌐 [Site information](https://www.rspb.org.uk/days-out/reserves/forsinard-flows)  
🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=58.353,-3.905)

<img src="images/sites/forsinardflows.jpeg">

</details>


<details>
<summary><strong>Flanders Moss</strong></summary>

**Location:** Scotland  
**Peatland type:** Raised bog  
**Coordinates:** 56.133, -4.317  

🌐 [Site information](https://www.nature.scot/enjoying-outdoors/visit-our-nature-reserves/flanders-moss-national-nature-reserve)  
🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=56.133,-4.317)

<img src="images/sites/flandersmoss.jpeg">

</details>


<details>
<summary><strong>Blawhorn Moss</strong></summary>

**Location:** Scotland  
**Peatland type:** Raised bog  
**Coordinates:** 55.893, -3.789  

🌐 [Site information](https://www.nature.scot/enjoying-outdoors/visit-our-nature-reserves/blawhorn-moss-national-nature-reserve)  
🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=55.893,-3.789)

<img src="images/sites/blawhornmoss.jpeg">

</details>


#### England

<details>
<summary><strong>Foulshaw Moss</strong></summary>

**Location:** England  
**Peatland type:** Raised bog  
**Coordinates:** 54.247, -2.832  

🌐 [Site information](https://www.cumbriawildlifetrust.org.uk/nature-reserves/foulshaw-moss)  
🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=54.247,-2.832)

<img src="images/sites/foulshawmoss.jpeg">

</details>


<details>
<summary><strong>Clough Moor</strong></summary>

**Location:** England  
**Peatland type:** Blanket bog  

<img src="images/sites/cloughmoor.jpg">

</details>


#### Wales

<details>
<summary><strong>Cors Fochno</strong></summary>

**Location:** Wales  
**Peatland type:** Raised bog  
**Coordinates:** 52.503, -4.019  

🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=52.503,-4.019)

<img src="images/sites/corsfochno.jpeg">

</details>


<details>
<summary><strong>Cors Fochno 2</strong></summary>

**Location:** Wales  
**Peatland type:** Raised bog  

<img src="images/sites/corsfochno2.jpeg">

</details>


<details>
<summary><strong>Castell Nos</strong></summary>

**Location:** Wales  
**Peatland type:** Restored bog  
**Coordinates:** 51.690, -3.504  

🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=51.690,-3.504)

<img src="images/sites/castellnos.jpeg">

</details>


### 🇮🇪 Ireland

<details>
<summary><strong>Killarney</strong></summary>

**Location:** Ireland  
**Peatland type:** Blanket bog  
**Coordinates:** 51.978, -9.53852  

🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=51.978,-9.53852)

<img src="images/sites/killarney.jpeg">

</details>


### 🇫🇷 France

<details>
<summary><strong>Jouvion</strong></summary>

**Location:** France  
**Peatland type:** Fen  
**Coordinates:** 45.485, 2.687  

🌐 [Site information](https://ens.puy-de-dome.fr/les-ens/tourbiere-de-jouvion.html)  
🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=45.485,2.687)

<img src="images/sites/jouvion.jpeg">

</details>


### 🇸🇪 Sweden

<details>
<summary><strong>Store Mosse</strong></summary>

**Location:** Sweden  
**Peatland type:** Raised bog  
**Coordinates:** 57.281, 13.910  

🌐 [Site information](https://www.sverigesnationalparker.se/en/choose-park---list/store-mosse-national-park/)  
🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=57.281,13.910)

<img src="images/sites/storemosse.jpeg">

</details>


### 🇫🇮 Finland

<details>
<summary><strong>Kauhaneva</strong></summary>

**Location:** Finland  
**Peatland type:** Raised bog  
**Coordinates:** 62.204, 22.429  

🌐 [Site information](https://retkeilelakeuksilla.fi/retkikohteet/kauhanevan-pohjankankaan-kansallispuisto/)  
🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=62.204,22.429)

<img src="images/sites/kauhaneva.jpeg">

</details>


<details>
<summary><strong>Torronsuo</strong></summary>

**Location:** Finland  
**Peatland type:** Raised bog  
**Coordinates:** 60.731, 23.634  

🌐 [Site information](https://www.visitfinland.com/en/product/05a7f953-f517-4bab-a470-e50cc2696b68/torronsuo-national-park/)  
🗺 [View on map](https://maps.google.com/?q=60.731,23.634)

<img src="images/sites/torronsuo.jpeg">

</details>


### 🇳🇱 Netherlands

<details>
<summary><strong>Fochteloërveen</strong></summary>

**Location:** The Netherlands  
**Peatland type:** Fen  

<img src="images/sites/fochteloerveen.jpg">

</details>


</div>

*Project funding*:<br>
Sustainable Earth Institute, University of Plymouth

*Project partners*:<br>
RSPB Scotland, UK<br>
Ducks Unlimited Canada<br>
Government of New Brunswick’s Department of Natural Resources, Canada<br>
The National Parks & Wildlife Service, Killarney National Park, Ireland<br>
Store Mosse National Park, County Administrative Board, Länsstyrelsen i Jönköpings län, Sweden<br>
Lauhanvuori – Hämeenkangas UNESCO Global Geopark and Metsähallitus National Parks, Finland<br>
Parc Naturel régional des Volcans d’Auvergne, France<br>
Natural Resources Wales<br>
Sue White - Peatland Action, Scotland<br>
NatureScot<br>
Société de conservation et de mise en valeur de la Grande plée Bleue / Ville de Lévis / Ministère de l’Environnement, de la Lutte contre les changements climatiques, de la Faune et des Parcs, Canada <br>
Parks Victoria, Australia
